EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The administrator {subject.name} created the certificate "{object.name}" on host {event_src.id}
The administrator {subject.name} removed the certificate "{object.name}" on host {event_src.id}
The administrator {subject.name} modified the certificate "{object.name}" on host {event_src.id}
The administrator {subject.name} added the certificate "{object.name}" on host {event_src.id}
